content.en:
"These peak realm gods are really too greedy!"

Ye Tian secretly sneered.

However, he estimated that there would definitely be a half-step transcendent realm behind these peak realm gods, otherwise these peak realm gods would not dare to do anything to him.

He was able to find so many Heavenly Chaos Golden Ruin Grass in that treasure land, and everyone knew that his strength was terrifying, and even guessed that he had comprehended the true extradimensional power.

But he is too rich, not to mention the peak realm god, even if it is a half-step transcendent realm, he will be excited!

Ye Tiancai returned to the Extreme Yang Realm, and before he could return to his mansion, he was ambushed halfway.

Rumble!!!!

One peak realm god after another made a move, and there were a total of sixteen peak realm gods.

The strength of these sixteen peak realm gods was not very strong, and Ye Tian naturally didn't take them seriously.

At this point, his gaze was fixed on somewhere in the void.

"Aren't the three of you coming out yet?"

Ye Tian said coldly.

Rumble!

The void shattered, and three figures walked out, and they were three half-step transcendent realms.

"What do you mean?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Hand over all the treasure resources on your body!"

A half-step transcendent realm said coldly.

"What if I don't hand it over?"

Ye Tian asked rhetorically.

"Then die!"

"Do it, don't talk nonsense with him!"

"Kill!"

The three half-step transcendent realms and more than a dozen peak realm gods made their moves.

thought they could kill Ye Tian in seconds, but soon they were dumbfounded.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian's body appeared with the super-dimensional power of the Xiaocheng realm, as well as the blessing of the super-dimensional heart, how terrifying the strength was.

Of course.

In terms of strength, Ye Tian must not be a three-step half-step transcendent realm team.

But Ye Tian was able to hold on for a while, he mainly relied on other copies of his body.

At this time, his other replica bodies had already arrived, and one of the replica bodies was carrying fragments of extradimensional dao soldiers, once it arrived, it was enough to bombard this group of peak realm gods and three half-step superdimensional realm powerhouses.

Thundered!!!!!

Ye Tian was besieged, but he showed a strength comparable to that of a half-step extradimensional realm, which made the three half-step extradimensional realms terrified.

"He must be killed, not allowed to live!"

The three half-step extradimensional realms roared.

They knew very well that once Ye Tian was allowed to leave alive, when Ye Tian stepped into the half-step transcendent realm, they would be far from being opponents.

Open up the super-dimensional heart domain and refine the super-dimensional power to the pinnacle of the realm of Xiaocheng, this can no longer be described as a demon, and it is difficult to give birth to one for hundreds of millions of extra-dimensional eras!

They are now besieging and killing such demons, how can they not panic!

The seconds passed.

Not only did they not kill Ye Tian, but instead let Ye Tian kill many peak realm gods.

Now, the other peak realm gods had all withdrawn, and they didn't dare to continue attacking Ye Tian, only the three half-step transcendent realms were still attacking.

Now.

Ye Tian's copy body is very seriously injured, after all, his strength is still not as good as these three half-step transcendent realms, under the siege, he naturally fell into the disadvantage, and now it is very good not to fall.

"It's here!"

Ye Tian smiled, his other copy bodies had already arrived.

This area was directly covered, and Ye Tian's copy body was scattered, blocking here, and the dense super dimensional secret treasure was urging.

And Ye Tian even urged the fragments of the super-dimensional dao soldiers, aiming at a half-step super-dimensional realm.

"Kill!"

The fragments of the extra-dimensional dao soldiers turned into a ray of light, and under the control of the super-dimensional control technique, they instantly penetrated the body of a half-step super-dimensional realm, killing it instantly.

"Extradimensional Fragment !!!"

"Run!"

The two half-step extradimensional realms were terrified, and they didn't dare to fight anymore, wanting to escape, but they were desperately intercepted by Ye Tian's other copy bodies.

Soon, Ye Tian manipulated the fragments of the super dimensional dao soldiers to launch a second blow.

Under this blow, kill another half-step extradimensional realm.

However, after forcibly urging the fragments of the superdimensional dao soldiers twice in a row, Ye Tian's duplicate body was also seriously injured, and the backlash had already affected his foundation.

Ye Tian didn't care, and continued to urge the fragments of the super dimensional dao soldiers, and launched the third time.

After this blow was launched, Ye Tian's flesh began to crack, and the Eternal Dao Seed was about to shatter, obviously this copy body was almost scrapped.

But this blow also successfully killed the third half-step extradimensional realm.

As for those peak realm gods, they were easily wiped out by Ye Tian.

After killing these peak realm gods and the half-step transcendent realm, Ye Tian quickly took their belongings and then immediately fled.

Ye Tian also knew very well that there must be forces behind these peak realm gods and half-step superdimensional realms, and they did not necessarily have the backers of superdimensional realms, but he didn't want to provoke the forces behind them.

After all, there are some top-notch half-step superdimensional realms, even if he uses the fragments of superdimensional dao soldiers, he can't help the other party, and the other party can kill him in seconds.

So, he needs to keep a low profile for a while.

......

The territory of a small force in the Extreme Yang Realm, Ye Tian infiltrated here, secretly controlled the leader of this force, and then lived in seclusion here.

Moreover, before he infiltrated here, he used a large amount of resources to exchange 10 billion Galan Treasure Coins at the Garan Chamber of Commerce, and exchanged and purchased a large amount of Immortal Gold Marrow in one go.

These immortal golden marrow were enough for him to refine his extradimensional power to the Dacheng realm.

In the following days, Ye Tian worked hard to refine the golden pith of immortality, and he didn't care about everything in the outside world.

As drops of immortal golden pith were refined by Ye Tian, his extradimensional power was also growing.

Moreover, he also used the various extra-dimensional resources he purchased to continue refining his Eternal Dao Seed, striving to refine the Eternal Dao Seed to the current limit.

The time (De Li Hao) is light.

Ten extradimensional epochs have passed.

At this time, Ye Tian's superdimensional power was already about to transform.

As another drop of immortal golden essence was refined, his extradimensional power began to truly transform into fire.

Rumble!!!!

The power of the super dimension has rapidly transformed, gradually transforming from the small adult level to the great adult level, and the super dimensional heart domain has also begun to skyrocket and expand wildly, and the aura on his body is also constantly improving.

I don't know how long it took for this metamorphosis to really complete.

And after the superdimensional power transformed to the Dacheng realm, he used the Dacheng-level superdimensional power to assist in refining the Eternal Dao Seed even faster, and it didn't take long to successfully refine the Eternal Dao Seed to the extreme.

"The power of the transcendent dimension has reached the Dacheng realm, and then you can condense the fifteenth eternal realm spirit!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

The fifteenth Eternal Realm Spirit, once it is condensed, how terrifying the strength will be!.
